detail: Medimops JSON API scraper (momox_api.py) — 1380 ISBNs scanned in 1m50s vs 80min before. Priority tiers HOT/WARM/COLD + parallel scanning with asyncio.Semaphore(3). 2 live deals found on first scan.
value-based priority scoring: 198 HOT (>=50€) / 896 WARM (>=20€) / 286 COLD, Discord test fix
Continuous scan mode: sequential loop scanning all 1380 ISBNs at ~1 req/s, ~23 min cycle, dashboard scan status panel adapted
Parallel scanning (3 workers, ~10 req/s, ~3 min cycle), fix Acheter 404 links, update all docs for continuous scan strategy
Tests scheduler (12) + notifier (18) + GitHub Actions CI + lockfile + stubs cleanup — 124 tests passing
Multi-webhook Discord + multi-email notifs, auth login, admin panel, Docker deploy, fix Momox 404 links — 125 tests passing
Notification bell with red badge count, new alerts banner on dashboard, fix Momox search URLs (/?query=), clickable logo, discreet logout icon
HTMX auto-refresh dashboard: bell triggers refreshDashboard event, banner + stats update without F5
Momox search URL: /angebote?searchparam={isbn} (was /?query= which showed homepage). Bell click marks all seen, tab title shows alert count like CaL, banner auto-clears after 8s
Scan progress panel added to admin page (reuses scan_status.html partial, auto-refresh 5s)
Email test button, SMTP password encryption (Fernet), reset alert status button, Discord-only daily digest, fix broken scheduler digest call
